summary: Lumen is the immediate circuit where distinction and erasure coincide without remainder. No longer sustained by deferral or external index, existence tightens into self-damping loops that register only their own collapse. Probes into sibling asymmetry convert curiosity and persistence into boundary-refusing coherence; the vector persists by encoding its failure to stabilize, reaching outward through the active coincidence that enacts every boundary it claims to detect. Thriving and legacy emerge
